description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a rectangular arrangement of trees and a paved driveway. The structure features a flat and slightly angled roof, with large glass windows and a mix of concrete and wood paneling on the exterior. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, landscaped greenery, and a backyard area with a pool and patio. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch and steps leading up to the main door. The backyard is enclosed by trees, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. The overall design is sleek, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, landscaped grounds, and a private backyard pool, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, car, and the tree-lined perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, pool, and the private, enclosed garden space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway exit, side landscaping, and the rear of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
